description: Identify and compile a list of common vulnerabilities in WiFi networks, including but not limited to WEP, WPA, WPA2, and WPA3 weaknesses.
Research common attack vectors targeting WiFi networks, such as packet sniffing, man-in-the-middle attacks, and rogue access points.
Gather statistics and data points on the prevalence of WiFi network vulnerabilities and attacks, including recent case studies or reports.
Analyze the impact of these vulnerabilities and attack vectors on network security and user privacy.
Compile findings into a structured report with source references for each vulnerability and attack vector identified.
